docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,257.00 FILED BY CHANG, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT STONESTOWN GALLERIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-05-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.) SERVED OCT-02-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT STONESTOWN GALLERIA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT STONESTOWN GALLERIA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-05-2012 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-10-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED THROUGH MEDIATION. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT STONESTOWN GALLERIA
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE MICHAEL DICKSTEIN. FILED BY CHANG, ROBERT STONESTOWN GALLERIA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-10-2012 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO JAN-14-2013 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY CHRISTINE MILLER--MARKETING MANAGER. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL DICKSTEIN. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-14-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-28-2013 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. " IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. THE PARTIES HAVE A MEDIATED SETTLEMENT WHERE BY DEFENDANT AGREED TO SEND A CHECK TO PLAINTIFF WHO HAS NOT YET RECEIVED IT. CONTINUED TO GIVE DEFENDANT A LITTLE MORE TIME TO GET THE CHECK-OUT"PER JUDGE MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE, PER PROGRESS REPORT OF 1/14/13. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: DAN DEAN. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
RETURN MAIL - SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER
